text:
While doing
activity
above, you must
have observed
that as the p
position AB
moves towards the position A' B', the common
point, say
Q1, of the line AB and the
circle gradually c
 comes nearer and nearer to the common point P. Ultimately, it coincides
with the point P in the position A'B' of A"B". Again note, what happens if ‘AB' is
rotated rightwards about P? The common point R gradually c
comes nearer and nearer
to P and ultimately c
coincides with P. So, what we see is:
